text: The environment here is bright and modern, yet also slightly disorienting due to the angular view and abundance of glass and reflections. I feel small amid the geometry and transparency, as if in a space designed for observation and contemplation. The presence of emergency equipment—fire extinguisher and hose reel—reminds me of latent vulnerabilities even in orderly spaces. I wonder, am I a participant or merely an observer in this controlled, carefully constructed world?
